Ruddy Shelduck
More info
eBird
(Tadorna ferruginea)

  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (Sasha Bertasius) "Excellent views of continuing male bird in old scrapes, seen through the middle hide. No rings seen on legs nor clipped wings, indicating that it's a wild bird. Was then gone after approximately 15:20."

Surf Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta perspicillata)

  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Pasi Hyvönen) "Off sea wall"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Becca M) "ID supported by two other birders, one with a scope which made the bird ID much clearer."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 1 (Nils Dittrich) "Continuing bird. In mixed scoter flock, 500m east of the lagoons, far out. Male scoter with white neck."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Jack Whitelegg) "2 visible on the water"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Terita Deare) "at least two on sea"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh (General) 3 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Still"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Steven Grout) "Cutting about with the others."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Sea Wall 3 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "ID'd by Mervin Griffin. White forehead, and back of head. Triangular bill, white base."
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (Jimmy Hair) "3 drakes - white napes and orange bill with white very visible."
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Sasha Bertasius) "Continuing male birds seen in scoter flock."
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Andrew Latham) "Drakes"
  • 02/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Sasha Bertasius) "Wonderful views of continuing male birds seen in a Velvet scoter flock, viewed from the part of the sea wall that's near the Old scrapes."
  • 02/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Sam Shutt) "Known males associating with a flock of Velvet and Common Scoter off the old scrapes. Flew in very close at one point. Photographed."
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 1 (Alex Radcliffe)
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Vicky Yeung) "2 still seen with group of mixed scoters"
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Owen Chiang) "2 still seen with group of mixed scoters"
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (David Kelly) "One of the two males seen on Monday. Sleeping with common and Velvet Scoters. White paitch on forehead and nape could be clearly seen."
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Andy Jarrett) "Asleep most of the time with other scoter flock but showing white nape clearly. Both woke up once each and showed bills off nicely."
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Owen Chiang) "two individuals with a group of velvet scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Vicky Yeung) "two individuals with a group of velvet scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Tom Gale) "known birds on sea with velvet scoter"

Velvet Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 100+

  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 50 (Pasi Hyvönen) "."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons X (Becca M) "ID supported by two other birders, one with a scope which made the bird ID much clearer."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 20 (Nils Dittrich) "Continuing. Scoter with white wingpanels and white eyemarking"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh (General) 25 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Not unusual."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Steven Grout) "Frequently observed."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Sea Wall 30 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "Large flock next to a flock of common. Also 3 surf scoters nearby"
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) X (Jimmy Hair) "Common at Musselburgh"
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 30 (Sasha Bertasius) "Est. Continuing birds, one group seen far off with the two Surfs, another group was seen flying over the Esk Mouth, briefly."
  • 02/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 20 (Sasha Bertasius) "Est. Seen very close in from the part of the sea wall that's nearest to the Old Scrapes."
  • 02/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 25 (Sam Shutt) "Not unusual"
  • 02/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 17 (Andy Gee) "Recurring birds, all black with small white wing patch, yellow bill, white under eye"
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 4 (Alex Radcliffe)
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 10 (Vicky Yeung) "mixed with common scoter and one surf scoter"
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 10 (Owen Chiang) "mixed with common scoter and one surf scoter"
  • 01/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 6 (David Kelly) "Not rare here"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 24 (Owen Chiang) "a group of velvet scoter with 2 surf scoter on sea"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Vicky Yeung) "mixef with a group of common scoter"
  • 30/06/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 25 (Tom Gale) "not rare"

Cetti's Warbler
More info
eBird
(Cettia cetti)

  • 01/07/26 Scoughall 1 (David Kelly) "Known bird. Calling occasionally. Seen briefly, once in the gorse and once crossing the river. Warbler with long broad tail , reddish-brown upperparts and grey underparts. Will try to upload recording."
